prompt: Write up Task 3 for the report — the demand map and clustering.

assertions.description: No first-person subjects ('I', 'we', 'our') appear in the text
File contains a \section{} LaTeX header for Task 3
Simulated annealing or clustering objective/formula present in math environment
assertions.check: grep '\\begin{equation}\|\\begin{align}' — should match; qualitatively check it relates to SA/clustering

assertions.description: Report covers both demand map (3.1) and clustering (3.2), not just one
assertions.check: Qualitative check — does text discuss both throughput demand surface AND cluster assignment?
